home.tagline: See the phish before it bites.

analyzer.title: Analyzer
analyzer.description: Paste an email, URL, or SMS and get an educational breakdown with indicators and verdict.

trainer.title: Trainer
trainer.description: Practice with AI-generated samples. Learn to spot the indicators yourself.

analyzer.title: Analyzer
analyzer.subtitle: Paste a suspicious email, URL or SMS. We return a verdict, a score, and the indicators explained.

form.contentPlaceholder: Paste the suspicious email, URL or SMS here...

result.indicators: {count, plural, =0 {No indicators} one {1 indicator} other {# indicators}}
result.noIndicators: No indicators detected. The content looks legitimate.

type.link_mismatch: Link does not match its label

error.title: Could not analyze
error.generic: The server returned an error. Please try again.
error.network: Could not reach the backend. Is it running on localhost:8000?
error.server: Backend or LLM provider failed: {detail}. Try again in a few seconds.

trainer.title: Trainer
trainer.subtitle: Practice with AI-generated samples. Classify, mark the indicators, learn from your misses.
trainer.indicatorsQuestion: Which indicators do you see? (check all that apply)

feedback.missed: {count, plural, one {You missed this indicator} other {You missed # indicators}}
feedback.falsePositive: {count, plural, one {You marked this indicator but it wasn't present} other {You marked # indicators that weren't present}}
feedback.falsePositiveExplain: This pattern is not present in the analyzed content. Over-flagging is also an error: it makes you distrust legitimate emails.

error.title: Could not load sample
error.generic: The server returned an error. Please try again.
error.network: Could not reach the backend. Is it running on localhost:8000?
error.server: Backend or LLM provider failed: {detail}. Try again in a few seconds.

trainer.emptyState: Pick a content type and starting difficulty, then press Start.
